title: Support Worker
description:
Precedo Healthcare are currently recruiting Support Workers in Sheffield and the surrounding areas to work on an agency basis within supported living services and residential settings.

As a Support Worker, you will be supporting individuals with learning disabilities, mental health needs, and complex needs. You will assist with daily living tasks, promote independence, and support service users to achieve personal goals.

Your responsibilities will include:

- Providing person-centred care and support
- Assisting with personal care where required
- Supporting service users with daily activities and routines
- Encouraging independence and social inclusion
- Working as part of a team and following care plans

Requirements:

- Previous experience in a similar role
- Good communication and interpersonal skills
- Ability to work flexible shifts including evenings and weekends

This role offers flexible agency work with competitive hourly rates.
summary: Agency support worker role in Sheffield supporting individuals with learning disabilities and mental health needs. Flexible shifts with person-centred care focus.

title: Care Assistant
description:
At Helping Hands, we provide care that supports people to live independently in their own homes.

As a Care Assistant, you will travel between clients' homes to provide high-quality care and companionship. You will support individuals with personal care, medication prompts, meal preparation, and light household duties.

Key responsibilities:

- Providing personal care and support
- Assisting with medication
- Supporting with meal preparation and nutrition
- Helping with mobility and transfers
- Offering companionship and emotional support

Requirements:

- A caring and compassionate nature
- A full UK driving licence and access to a vehicle
- Availability to work flexible shifts

Full training and ongoing support are provided.
summary: Sheffield care assistant role providing home-based support including personal care, meals, and companionship. Requires driving licence and offers full training.

title: Residential Support Worker
description:
The Recruitment Crowd are currently recruiting Residential Support Workers to work within children's residential homes in Rotherham.

You will support children and young people with emotional and behavioural needs, providing a safe and structured environment.

Responsibilities include:

- Supporting daily routines and activities
- Promoting positive behaviour and emotional wellbeing
- Working alongside colleagues to deliver care plans
- Ensuring safeguarding standards are met

Requirements:

- Previous experience in residential childcare
- Understanding of safeguarding and behaviour management
- Flexibility to work shifts including nights and weekends

This is flexible agency work with competitive rates.
summary: Rotherham residential support worker role focused on supporting children with emotional and behavioural needs. Agency work with flexible shifts and safeguarding responsibilities.

title: Support Worker
description:
Creative Support are looking for warm, reliable and proactive Support Workers to join our team in Barnsley to provide quality care and support to individuals with mental health needs.

You will develop trusting relationships with service users, support recovery-focused goals, and promote independence.

Key duties:

- Building positive relationships with service users
- Supporting recovery and wellbeing
- Encouraging independence and social inclusion
- Working as part of a team to deliver high-quality care

Benefits include training, pension contributions, and career progression opportunities.
summary: Barnsley support worker role supporting adults with mental health needs through recovery-focused care and independence support. Includes training and progression opportunities.

title: Care Assistant
description:
Company Description

Pay: £12.71

Shifts: Flexible - Full Time, Part Time, Evenings & Weekends

Driver Required: Walking & Driving Positions Available

We're sorry, but we do not currently offer sponsorship to applicants.

We are CCH.

As a Care Assistant, you will support people in their own homes with personal care, daily tasks, and companionship.

You will work flexible shifts and be part of a supportive care team.
summary: Doncaster care assistant role with flexible shifts supporting individuals at home. Includes personal care, daily support, and companionship.

title: Complex Care Assistant
description:
Female Complex Care Assistant Sheffield £15.00 per hour (including holiday pay) Permanent contract available after successful probation.

Applicants must have the right to work in the UK and must be a driver with access to their own vehicle. This role is restricted to female applicants under the Equality Act due to specific care needs.

You will provide specialist care and support to individuals with complex needs, ensuring safety, comfort, and dignity at all times.
summary: Sheffield complex care role paying £15 per hour supporting individuals with higher needs. Driver required with permanent contract opportunity.
